title: Лесенка: Up and Down
description: Наступай на ступеньки, подсвечивая слова. Лесенка 1 — утро (снизу-вверх), Лесенка 2 — вечер (сверху-вниз)

ladders.title: Утро (снизу вверх)
steps: I get up at seven o'clock.
I get up at seven o'clock and go to school.
I get up at seven o'clock, go to school and have lunch.
I get up at seven o'clock, go to school, have lunch and do my homework.
I get up at seven o'clock, go to school, have lunch, do my homework and play in the evening.

ladders.title: Вечер (сверху вниз)
steps: In the evening, I eat dinner, watch TV, read a book and say good bye to my family before I go to bed.
In the evening, I eat dinner, watch TV, read a book and say good bye to my family.
In the evening, I eat dinner, watch TV, read a book.
In the evening, I eat dinner, watch TV.
In the evening, I eat dinner and watch TV.
In the evening, I eat dinner and go to bed.
In the evening, I go to bed and read a book.
